description: Operational dashboard for debproxy, the APT caching proxy. Metrics are scraped from /metrics via Prometheus in Kubernetes.

panels.title: Pool Hits by Upstream (total over range)

targets.expr: topk(20, sum(rate(debproxy_pull_throughs_total{namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (os, codename, upstream, result))

panels.title: API Request Rate by Resource & Action

title: debproxy APT Proxy
